tools.name: cpp_resolve_symbol
tools.description: Resolve a fuzzy C++ symbol reference to exact symbol candidates.

tools.name: cpp_semantic_query
tools.description: Run a normalized semantic query over C++ code entities, scopes, filters, and relations. Use the 'fields' parameter to limit which fields are returned per item and keep responses small. For listing method names use: action=list, entity=method, scope={file:...}, fields=["qualified_name","signature","access"].

tools.name: cpp_describe_symbol
tools.description: Return a normalized summary of one exact symbol.
